name: @tootallnate/ff8-battle
description: Pure-JS parser for Final Fantasy VIII battle model DAT files (`c0m###.dat` inside `battle.fs`). Decodes the multi-section container — skeleton (bones), geometry (vertices/triangles/quads with bit-packed vertex/texture indices), bit-packed animation frames, the 380-byte enemy stats record, and embedded PSX TIM textures. Other sections (animation sequences, AI script, AKAO sound effects) are exposed as raw bytes.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
